finding_results.notes: Replaced repeated bookkeeping/standards framing in Peter's control language with varied pressure tactics. Public dialogue now uses reputational and class-coded intimidation (street reputation, pride challenge), while private dialogue shifts to faux-concern minimization and corrective domination. Nearby narration was also revised to remove ledger echoing and preserve voice separation.
finding_results.summary: Peter's intimidation cadence is now diversified across public and private beats, with no dominant repeated accounting diction and clearer leverage shifts.

summary: Addressed all dialogue/idiolect/cadence packet findings for chapter_03 by revising Peter's repeated control diction into distinct pressure modes while preserving continuity and character register.
